title: The Special Need
overview: 28 year old Enea is looking for love - physical love that is. But as the autist he is, living in Italy, this is anything but easy. So he and his best friends Carlo and Alex set out on a journey through Europe and eventually find a lot more than they are looking for.

trailers.title: POURVU QU’ON M’AIME Bande Annonce (Documentaire sur l'Autisme)
